reasoning_chain: The dry, arid landscape with sparse vegetation and limestone terrain is characteristic of Malta’s rural countryside.
The traditional dry-stone walls lining the road are a hallmark of Maltese agricultural land division and heritage.
The absence of modern infrastructure like utility poles or paved roads suggests a remote, non-urban area typical of Malta’s interior.
